pages.title: Overload & First Aid
pages.text: Equip it in the $(bold)back slot$() to gain both Neural Overload mitigation and low-health emergency healing.$(br2)The abilities are independent: first aid works without overload, and overload mitigation continues during the healing cooldown.

pages.title: Overload Mitigation
pages.text: Every 10 ticks, the pack checks all Neural Overload variants. By default it removes 2 extra duration ticks per game tick; together with natural countdown, overload expires at roughly 3x speed.$(br2)It does not prevent overload or remove the beneficial serum effect. It only shortens overload that already exists.

pages.title: Emergency Healing
pages.text: By default, at 6 health or lower (3 hearts):$(br2)$(li)Consumes 1 Biochemical Solution from inventory.$(br)$(li)Heals 4 health (2 hearts).$(br)$(li)Grants Haste I for 10 seconds.$(br)$(li)Starts a 60-second cooldown.$(br2)Without Biochemical Solution, no healing occurs and no cooldown starts.

pages.title: Chest Sources
pages.text: Each matching chest has a 20% chance to gain one pack:$(br2)$(li)Abandoned mineshaft$(br)$(li)Simple dungeon$(br)$(li)Pillager outpost$(br2)The pack has no crafting recipe. Its reduction rate, heal threshold, and cooldown are configurable.
